center.name: 巴布亚省
center.summary: 巴布亚省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Sultan's cuckoo-dove、金脸啸鹟、Baliem whistler等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Baliem whistler is found in the Snow Mountains of Papua Province in Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: doreya at Mount Mahawu, North Sulawesi | status = | status_system = | status_ref = | genus = Macropygia | species = doreya | authority = Bonaparte, 1854 | subdivision_ranks = Subspecies | subdivision = See text }} Sultan's cuckoo-dove (Macropygia doreya) is a dove in the genus Macropygia found in the northern Moluccas, Sulawesi to New Guinea and the western Papuan islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The grey-banded mannikin (Lonchura vana), or grey-banded munia, is a species of estrildid finch known to be found in Anggi Gigi, Tamrau Mountains, and Arfak Mountains in the Vogelkop Peninsula in north-western Papua, Indonesia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is endemic to the island of New Guinea, where it occurs in both Papua and Papua New Guinea. The preferred habitat of the goldenface is hill and montane forest, between 400 and 1800 m; it is usually commoner in dense forest between 1600 and 1800 m

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2023 |title=Lonchura stygia |article-number=e.T22719890A218580144 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2023-1.RLTS.T22719890A218580144.en}} | genus = Lonchura | species = stygia | authority = Stresemann, 1934 | range_map = Black_Mannikin_Distribution.jpg | range_map_caption = }} The black mannikin (Lonchura stygia) or black munia, is a species of estrildid finch found in New Guinea, from Mandum (Papua, formerly known as Irian Jaya, Indonesia) to Lake Daviumbu, Papua New Guinea
